prompt: A trust-but-verify concept: a validated node in a git-commit-like graph lit by a beam hitting solid bedrock labelled as ground truth, contrasted with a faded ghost branch dissolving into mist. Dark gradient background, tech / developer aesthetic, conceptual visualization, no text, no letters, no words, no watermark. Cohesive palette: deep indigo, teal, soft cyan glow, subtle warm gold accents.
